revision.content:
= Cluster System Administrator Class =

Meeting: Tuesdays, starting January 24th until March 7th, from 7:00pm to 9:30pm

* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/a/a3/Bloominglabs-ClusterSysAdmin-syllabus.pdf Syllabus]
* [https://access.redhat.com/documentation/en/red-hat-enterprise-linux/6/?version=6/ RHEL 6 documentation]
* [https://access.redhat.com/site/documentation/en-US/Red_Hat_Enterprise_Linux/6/html/Installation_Guide/index.html RHEL Installation Guide]

=== March 7th ===
* Setup TORQUE
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/6/65/Torque-5.1.3-1-rpms.tar.gz TORQUE rpms]
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/5/51/SysadminClass-Lecture4.pdf Lecture Notes for TORQUE]

=== February 21st and 28th, 2017 ===
* Setup iptables
* Setup NTP server
* Setup LDAP server (SLAPD)
* Setup NFS
* SSH security
* Re-configure kickstart
* Re-install nodes
* Set nodes to boot off local disk
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/0/0e/SysadminClass-Lecture3.pdf Lecture Notes]
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/0/0f/SysadminClass3.tar.gz Config Files]

=== February 7th and 14th, 2017 ===
* Disable iptables/selinux
* Finish setting up DNS
* Setup DHCP
* Configure mgmt node's wired network port to use new DNS server
* Setup httpd
** Copy CentOS 6 installation files (CentOS/6.8/x86_64)
* Configure yum to use local repo
* Setup PXE server 
* Modify DHCP to PXE boot
* Configure Kickstart config file
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/8/88/SysadminClass-Lecture2.pdf Lecture Notes]
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/b/b8/SysadminClass2.tar.gz Config Files]

=== January 31st, 2017 ===

* Reinstall mgmt nodes with more full featured install
* Setup wireless networking on mgmt node
* Networking
** [http://bloominglabs.org/images/5/55/SysadminClass-Lecture1.pdf Lecture notes]
** [http://www.escotal.com/osilayer.html OSI Model]
** [http://wintelguy.com/subnetcalc.pl IP Subnet Calculator]
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/5/55/SysadminClass-Lecture1.pdf Lecture Notes]
* [http://bloominglabs.org/images/b/be/SysadminClass1.tar.gz Config Files]
** #Errata: In dhcpd.conf, change the domain-name-server on line 30 to be 192.168.2.30
*** This is fixed in current version of the tarball

=== January 24th, 2017 ===
* Setup hardware
